name: Switch tracker and re-search

falsifiability_protocol.mutation_step: Mutate switchTracker() so that it does NOT update _activeTrackerId.value (comment out the assignment).
falsifiability_protocol.expected_failure: Results stay RuTracker even after operator taps RuTor; banner remains 'Results from RuTracker'; waitUntil 'Results from RuTor' visible times out.
falsifiability_protocol.expected_assertion_message_substring: Failed to assertWaitUntil: condition not met within 30000ms

operator_run_instructions: Capture screenshots: (a) RuTracker results, (b) RuTor (active) badge, (c) RuTor results banner.
Perform falsifiability mutation, re-run, capture verbatim failure, revert.
